title: ipomoea staplesii
intro: Ipomoea staplesii, also known as the Hawaiian Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant native to the islands of Hawaii. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea staplesii include relieving pain and inflammation, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a topical ointment or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
